name: Sneha Nair
title: Analytics Engineer
summary: Software / data professional with 2.2 years of experience building data pipelines, backend systems, and analytics infrastructure. Started my career in backend engineering and gradually moved closer to data — first dashboards, then ETL, now some basic ML. My toolkit is solid on the data engineering side — Python, SQL, Spark, Airflow, warehouse design — and I've completed a couple of self-directed ML projects (Kaggle competitions, side projects fine-tuning small models). Interested in transitioning toward more AI/ML-focused work, ideally at a company where I can leverage my existing data-infra skills while learning modern ML practice.

explainability.why_selected: 2.2 years experience in Analytics Engineer with AWS. Strong recruiter responsiveness (42%), minor concern: 30-day notice.
explainability.recruiter_notes: Candidate has 2.2 years of experience and 8 skills. Notice period: 30 days. Expected salary: 13.6 LPA. Priority level: Medium.
